prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese alternative rock album promotional poster in a dark cinematic photorealistic style, vertical 2:3 composition, with three young male rock band members posed heroically in the foreground. The center figure stands slightly lower and closest to camera, wearing a black leather biker jacket open at the chest, layered necklaces, a black choker, pale skin, shaggy black hair, and a moody rebellious expression. The left figure is tall and slim with messy ash-blond hair, extensive neck and chest tattoos, a distressed black shirt under a black leather jacket, layered chains, and a belt. The right figure is tall and slim with tousled light brown hair, a gray distressed military-style jacket over a black skull graphic shirt, layered necklaces, rings, visible hand tattoos, and a belt. Behind them is a ruined urban battlefield at dusk or night with smoke, sparks, tattered flags, birds or crows in the sky, crumbling buildings, backlight halos behind the two standing figures, and a gritty apocalyptic atmosphere. Add scratched film texture, cracked glass overlays, dust, embers, and high-contrast moody lighting with desaturated blacks, charcoal gray, sepia bronze, and muted steel tones. Include 13 visible text blocks integrated like a premium music poster: at the very top, small English text reading "ALTERNATIVE ROCK NEW ERA BEGINS"; 3 mid-poster song callouts, left "地上" with romanization "CHIJOU" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath, center "解放" with romanization "KAIHOU" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath, right "掲げろ" with romanization "KAKAGERO" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath; one huge central Japanese headline reading "この声が、時代を変える。"; beneath it one English line "ALTERNATIVE ROCK"; beneath that one Japanese tagline line "三つの歌が、ひとつの未来を創る—"; beneath that one English tagline line "3 SONGS. 3 SOULS. 1 REVOLUTION"; then 3 bottom release blocks labeled "解放", "地上", and "掲げろ", each with its romanization and the date "2025.06.01 RELEASE"; and at the very bottom a boxed banner reading "NEW ALBUM - 2025.06.01 ON SALE". Make the typography metallic, weathered, and luminous, with the large Japanese headline dominating the lower middle. The overall feeling should be epic, rebellious, emotional, and like a high-budget visual key art poster for a Japanese alternative rock album titled around the songs 地上, 解放, and 掲げろ.
